race.comment: BARBARY TALES (6) made it two wins from her last three outings two weeks ago, getting home by 2.25 metres over 2200m at this track. This looks a sterner test than last time but she is capable of making it consecutive wins. CARMEN EMJAY (13) made it two wins from her last three starts when she scored by 2.25 metres on July 5 over 2200m at this track. May just need a bit of luck at some point from this difficult draw. Meets some better types this time but she has the ability to test this field. THE BRIDE (12) finished third at this track last time. Consistent performer whose best form stacks up favourably so she must be included. SMOOTH REASON (3) disappointed last time when seventh over 2200m at this track. Can atone.
